name: Ping Pong
current_goal: Maintain the single-node intranet speed-test service with browser-scoped Recent Results, fixed homepage Quick 20s and Full 30s modes, proportional startup trimming, Raw CV and Stable CV throughput diagnostics, stability-first completion summaries, required per-test Wired/Wi-Fi labeling, current connection IP visibility, Web Worker execution, HTML/PNG/Markdown IT diagnostic report export, a desktop one-screen dashboard, Admin Console controls, local production health, OctoPulse visibility, and repo-visible project documentation.
latest_summary: Throughput statistics now use proportional startup trimming, discarding ceil(3%) of post-warmup samples while keeping at least one sample. Download and Upload continue to show the IQR-filtered stable mean; detail/report surfaces Stable Mean, P10, P50, P90, Raw CV, Stable CV, and samples kept. Stability summary now takes the worst grade from Raw CV, P10/Mean ratio, IQR outlier rate, and jitter. ThroughputStats, /api/results validation, SQLite persistence, migrations, reports, and tests support rawCvPercent with legacy fallback to cvPercent. The homepage now has fixed Quick 20s and Full 30s duration buttons, Quick is default, and the Admin Console duration label is clarified as a fallback duration.
next_action: Review and commit the speed-test statistics optimization when ready. Separately decide whether the pre-existing .gitignore, AGENTS.md, deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked HTML specification, and other unrelated dirty files are intentional.

last_commands: In-app Browser verification checked Quick 20s default, Full 30s selection, Wired selection enabling Start, no console warnings/errors, and viewport layout at 1089x964, 1280x900, 1710x1021, 390x844, and 768x1024
verification.notes: All automated checks passed after the speed-test statistics optimization: typecheck, full Vitest suite (8 files, 76 tests), production build, and git diff whitespace check. Tests cover 3% startup discard counts for 50/76/116 samples, proportional startup trimming, IQR mean behavior, Raw CV vs Stable CV on Wi-Fi-like data, stability downgrades from Raw CV, P10/Mean ratio, and IQR outlier rate, rawCvPercent API/SQLite save-read, and legacy migration fallback from cvPercent. The LaunchAgent-backed service was restarted on the configured .env port 8200 after the final build. Health, report-context, homepage, and recent-results API checks returned successfully. In-app Browser verification found Quick 20s selected by default, Full 30s selectable, Wired selection enabling Start, no console errors or warnings, no visible horizontal overflow, equal desktop first-row card widths, and desktop scroll height matching viewport height at 1089x964, 1280x900, and 1710x1021. Mobile 390x844 and tablet 768x1024 remained scrollable with all content reachable; the 390px layout was adjusted so Download/Upload diagnostic stats are readable in single-column primary cards.

attention: Working tree remains dirty beyond .ai/status.json. It includes the speed-test statistics optimization plus pre-existing .gitignore and AGENTS.md edits, a deleted Ping-Pong-專案說明書.docx, untracked Ping-Pong-Project-Specification.html, docs/analysis-data-debugging.md, and other existing modified files that still need user decision before commit.
The running service uses .env PORT=8200, not the README default 8080.
Browser verification used localhost with local self-test enabled by runtime settings; a non-local intranet device test is still required to evaluate real network performance.

recent_changes.summary: Implemented Quick 20s/Full 30s homepage modes, proportional throughput trimming, raw CV diagnostics, stricter stability grading, rawCvPercent API/SQLite support, report/README updates, and responsive QA fix.
recent_changes.verification: npm run typecheck; npm test; npm run build; git diff --check; launchctl restart; curl health/report/home/recent; in-app browser QA at 1089x964, 1280x900, 1710x1021, 390x844, 768x1024
